title: Protrepticus: Exhortation to Philosophy
description: Iamblichus exhorts students to philosophy: the soul, imprisoned in the body, can be freed only through the pursuit of wisdom.
introduction: Iamblichus exhorts students to philosophy: the soul, imprisoned in the body, can be freed only through the pursuit of wisdom.

translation.text: The soul was born in bondage and can be freed only through philosophy. This is the reason for our exile.
